emails.subject: Azalea Trail
emails.body: Would you like to do some Azalea Trailing on Sunday afternoon? Henry will owe me some babysitting time after being gone for 2 weeks and I always have fun cruising the lifesyle of the rich and famous set with you..... ALG

emails.subject: Re: Azalea Trail
emails.body: Re: Azalea Trail It sound good to me. Shall we meet at your house or mine and at what time? Alicia Goodrow/ENRON@enronXgate 03/06/2001 05:13 PM

emails.subject: RE: Azalea Trail
emails.body: RE: Azalea Trail If you don't mind dropping me back by home after we tour, I'll have Henry= =20 drop me at your new house after church on Sunday......maybe at 1245....I=20 haven't seen your new digs.=01; Where exactly are they? =01; Alicia =20

emails.subject: RE: Azalea Trail
emails.body: Sounds like a good plan! I'm at 1920 Banks Street, the last street off=20 Shepherd before you hit the Swest Fwy. So, when you leave church, go down= =20 Shepherd, then make a right on the last street before the fwy. Go past the= =20 1st stop sign and then I'll be about the 3rd or 4th house on the left, a=20 taupe colored cottage with a pointy roof and vines growing halfway up the= =20 side of the house. My home is 529-1038. See you at 12:45! =09Alicia Goodrow/ENRON@enronXgate =0903/09/2001 08:24 AM =09=09=20 =09=09
